Core Services

Everything You Need to Automate & Scale

Engineer-built systems designed specifically for small businesses. No fluff, just results.

📞

AI Receptionist

Never miss another call. Your AI receptionist answers 24/7, books appointments, qualifies leads, and sounds completely human. Your customers can't tell the difference.

✓ Answers instantly (no hold music ever)
✓ Books appointments directly in your calendar
✓ Sends confirmation texts automatically
✓ Transfers complex calls to you seamlessly
✓ Works with your existing phone number
🌐

AI Website

Modern, mobile-optimized website that converts visitors into customers. Built for speed, SEO, and growth. Ongoing maintenance and updates included.

✓ Custom design matched to your brand
✓ Mobile-responsive and SEO-optimized
✓ Contact forms and booking integration
✓ Hosting, security, and updates included
✓ Google Analytics and conversion tracking
📱

Social Media Automation

Consistent, high-quality content across all platforms. Stay top-of-mind without the daily grind of posting. AI-powered content creation and scheduling.

✓ 30-day content calendar pre-built
✓ Scheduled posting to all platforms
✓ Performance tracking and optimization
✓ AI-assisted content creation
✓ Engagement monitoring and alerts
🎥

AI Avatar / Clone

Your digital twin that represents your brand 24/7. Perfect for video content, training, customer interactions, and scaling your personal brand without recording every time.

✓ Photorealistic digital avatar of you
✓ Trained on your voice and mannerisms
✓ Generate videos from text instantly
✓ Multiple languages and accents
✓ Unlimited video generation included
🎬

AI Video Ads

High-converting AI-generated video commercials for Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok. Engaging visual hooks and professional voiceovers without the massive production costs.

✓ 4 targeted videos per month
✓ Platform-specific formats
✓ A/B tested hooks & copy
✓ Professional AI voiceovers
⚙️

Advanced Automations

Complex, multi-step workflows connecting your CRM, billing, email, and fulfillment. Custom scripting and API integrations to automate your most time-consuming backend tasks.

✓ Custom Zapier/Make workflows
✓ CRM & billing synchronization
✓ Automated reporting & dashes
✓ Direct API integrations
Our Guarantees

Meet The Founder

Built by Engineers Who Answer Their Phone

I'm Jonathon Murray, a mechanical and quality engineer with 5+ years experience in the aerospace Industry. I started Infinite Automationz because I wanted to help businesses grow & scale through the power of automation and AI.

We're not outsourcing to overseas VAs or selling you cheap templates. Every automation system is custom-built by our team & built to last.

⚙️
Engineering Background 8+ years building systems for aerospace & defense
🏢
Multiple Businesses AI automation, athletic wear brand, fitness app development
📍
Locally Based Huntsville/Madison — we meet in person, speak your language
🎯
Real Results $2M+ in revenue generated for clients, 50+ businesses served

How It Works

Your 4-Step Journey to Automation

Simple, transparent, and stress-free. Here's exactly what happens:

1
Step 1

Discovery & Planning

We dive deep into your business. We'll map your workflows, identify pain points, and design your custom automation blueprint. You'll see exactly what we're building before we write a single line of code.

✓ 60-min strategy call
✓ Workflow audit
✓ Custom blueprint
2
Step 2

Build & Integration

This is where the magic happens. We build your AI systems, integrate with your existing tools, and configure everything to work exactly the way you need. You'll get daily updates and can see progress in real-time.

✓ AI system development
✓ Tool integrations
✓ Daily progress updates
3
Step 3

Testing & Training

We put your system through its paces with extensive testing. You'll learn how everything works, test it yourself, and we'll refine based on your feedback. Nothing goes live until you're 100% confident.

✓ Comprehensive testing
✓ Team training session
✓ Documentation & guides
4
Step 4

Launch & Optimization

Go-live day! We monitor everything closely for the first week, making adjustments as real-world usage reveals opportunities. You'll have direct access to me for immediate support if anything comes up.

✓ Monitored launch
✓ Real-time optimization
✓ Direct support access

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about working with us

Most setups are complete within 7-10 business days. For AI receptionists, we typically go live in under a week. Website and social media automation can take 2-3 weeks depending on complexity. We'll give you a precise timeline during your free consultation.

No contracts, no penalties. You can cancel anytime with 30 days notice. If you're not happy in the first 30 days, we'll refund your setup fee and first month—no questions asked. That's our 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee.

Yes! We integrate with virtually any system—your booking software, CRM, email, calendar, payment processors, you name it. We've worked with everything from Google Calendar to custom appointment systems. We'll audit your tech stack in the consultation and confirm compatibility.

Nope! Your customers keep calling the same number. We set up call forwarding so the AI answers, then transfers important calls to you. You stay in control—the AI handles the routine stuff, and you get the calls that matter.

We test extensively before launch and monitor performance daily. If something goes wrong, you get instant alerts and we fix it immediately—often before you even notice. Plus, you can always manually override the AI or route calls directly to you.

Absolutely. We use bank-level encryption, secure servers, and HIPAA-compliant systems (when needed). Your customer data is never shared with third parties, and you maintain full ownership. We're Huntsville-based and take your trust seriously.

100%! We customize the AI to sound like your business. You choose the tone (professional, friendly, casual), the script, what info it collects, and how it handles different scenarios. It's like hiring someone who follows your exact playbook.

We do! Your monthly fee includes all updates, maintenance, bug fixes, and improvements. You'll never need to hire a tech person or worry about things breaking. We monitor everything 24/7 and keep your systems running smooth.

We specialize in local service businesses: dental offices, HVAC companies, gyms, salons, med spas, contractors, real estate agents, law firms, and more. If you book appointments, answer calls, or need consistent marketing, we can help.

Click "Book Free Consultation" above and grab a 30-minute slot. We'll audit your current setup, discuss your goals, and show you exactly what we'd build for your business. Zero pressure, just solutions. Most people book same-day.
